description: A live broadcast still labeled 'House Chamber' showing a man in a dark suit and tie seated with his head resting on his hand and eyes closed, with U.S. and Ukraine lapel pins. A chyron reads 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Delivers State of the Union Address' with 'REAL AMERICA'S VOICE' and 'THE REAL STATE OF THE UNION' graphics.
notable_text: House Chamber; PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Delivers State of the Union Address; REAL AMERICA'S VOICE
